title: Venice Gardens Greenhouse
tags: venice gardens greenhouse la serra dei giardini biennale biennal biennalen biennial architecture arquitectura arkitektur historical antaño kulturhistorisk växthus venezia venedig veneto region región italy italia italien europe europa eu european union unión europea unioneuropea
description: (Italian: La Serra dei Giardini) The greenhouse was built in 1894 and is the oldest permanent structure in the whole original system of the Biennale. It's preceding the main Exhibition building erected in 1895 and the first National Pavilion, the Belgium one, built in 1907. The greenhouse has hosted exotic plants for the International Art Exhibition.

title: Enigma
description:
” E allora la voce, la Voce che avevo riconosciuto sotto la maschera, che non aveva potuto nascondermela, era là in ginocchio davanti a me: un uomo !”

“Smisi perfino di pensare all’orribile situazione in cui mi trovavo, non chiesi nemmeno che cosa ne sarebbe stato di me e qual era il progetto oscuro e freddamente tirannico che mi aveva condotto in quel salone, come si conduce un prigioniero in una cella, una schiava in un harem…eccola la Voce: un uomo!”

“E’ vero Christine…non sono nè angelo, nè genio, nè fantasma…sono Erik!”.

Giuseppe Garibaldi (1807– 1882) was an Italian general and politician who played a large role in the history of Italy. He is considered, as one of Italy's "fathers of the fatherland".
Garibaldi was a central figure in the Italian Risorgimento, since he personally commanded and fought in many military campaigns that led eventually to the formation of a unified Italy.

title: Relationship LXX left in Venice
tags: venice italy streetart sexy collage trash recycling left trashy mycollages rayjohnsonfanclub
description: Ray Johnson Fan Club Relationship LXX ~ "I DON'T NEED TO love EVERYTHING" This 70th collage was completed on 8/19/2013 using trash found on the streets of Venice. I made it overnight at our rental flat on Fondamenta San Giuseppe. It was made on the album cover "Parade des Succes No. 31." This collage was left the same morning near the entrance to Fondamenta San Giuseppe in Venice, Italy. See the original artwork in the photo below. Do you LIKE me? www.facebook.com/rayjohnsonfanclub USING TRASH OFF THE STREETS TO MAKE ART ON THE STREETS. I use only trash and found items to make these one-of-a-kind, hand cut and paste, signed & numbered artworks. I use trashy paperback book covers, record & magazine covers, CDs, posters, postcards and other mass-produced media as a base for my hand-cut & paste collages, which I usually leave out on the streets for anyone to enjoy (or destroy.) Find out more at: www.rayjohnsonfanclub.com SERIOUSLY TRASHY STREET ART!

tags: venice italia venise venezia italie iltaly dalbera chemiserouge giuseppezolli garibaldien
description: Statue de Giuseppe Zolli, une "chemise rouge", compagnon de Garibaldi Ce soldat garibaldien (1838-?) dont la statue est érigée sur le monument à Garibaldi, Viale Garibaldi, à Venise, à l'entrée du jardin, fait l'objet d'une histoire rocambolesque de fantôme évoquée dans l'ouvrage "Venise insolite et secrète" des éditions Jonglez. Cette statue ne figurait pas initialement sur le mémorial à Garibaldi mais a été ajoutée par la suite. Ce soldat aurait promis à Garibaldi, le Héros des deux Mondes, de rester à ses cotés même après sa mort.

title: The Venice you usually don't see

Fedele oltre la morte
tags: venice italy sculpture statue italia phantom venezia garibaldi statua scultura risorgimento fiatlux mistero mystere fantasmi garibaldino reinassence
description: Statua del garibaldino Giuseppe Zolli ai piedi del monumento dedicato a Garibaldi nei giardini di Castello. Veneziano che partecipò alla spedizione dei mille, giurò di difendere per sempre il suo eroe. Dopo la sua morte nell'estate del 1921 si susseguirono gli avvistamenti di un'ombra rossa che aggrediva i passanti nei pressi del monumento. Per placare quest'anima in pena da allora la sua statua vigila ai piedi del monumento. Faithful beyond death Statue of Giuseppe Zolli at the foot of the monument to Garibaldi in the Castello Gardens. Venetian, who participated in the expedition of a thousand, he vowed to defend his hero forever. After his death in the summer of 1921, followed sightings of a red shadow that attacked passersby near the monument. To quench this soul in pain since then watches his statue at the foot of the monument. -- Setup -- Nikon D700 Nikkor AF-D 50 f/1.4 Venice - Italy

title: Castello near Via Garibaldi
comments: Interlingua: Internet was expensive, and my hotel room lacked a TV, so that I had no idea of the temps. Since the water on the streets wasn't frozen, I assumed it was over freezing. But I'd forgotten that all this water was salt. When I saw this fountain's icicles, I realized I'd been spending about 6 hours a day strolling around in sub-freezing temps. Beautiful but brrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr

title: Venice Bench (Sant Elena)
description: Taken on my trip to Italy. The Biennale pavillion was just around the corner from here, but it was covered with Barbara Kruger slogans so I ran away.
